svg.text: Best run AL-20260329-030 reached 1.3564 val_bpb. 34 scored runs are tracked here, with 13 kept and 21 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260329-030 (keep) tested the untied + softcap20 frontier may still want a faster output-head learning rate, and a higher `HEAD_LR=0.012` could improve it further.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
